summary: Completed frontend testing of search, sort, filter, and CSV export features on Gateways, Devices, and Live Feed pages. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Gateways page - Search by name/DevEUI/ID working
Gateways page - Sort by Name, DevEUI, Lat, Lng, Status columns working
Gateways page - Filter by status (Active/Inactive) working
Gateways page - Export CSV downloads file with correct headers and data
Gateways page - Reset filters button appears and works
Gateways page - Shows filtered count (X din Y)
Devices page - Search by name/DevEUI working
Devices page - Sort by Name, DevEUI, SF Average, Buffer, Last Activity columns working
Devices page - Filter by SF quality (Excelent/Mediu/Slab/Fără date) working
Devices page - Export CSV downloads file with correct data
Devices page - Reset filters button appears and works
Devices page - Shows filtered count (2 din 299 when filtered)
Live Feed page - Search by device name/DevEUI/gateway working
Live Feed page - Sort by Time, Name, SF, RSSI, SNR columns working
Live Feed page - Filter by registration status (Registered/Unregistered) working
Live Feed page - Export CSV downloads file with correct data
Live Feed page - Reset filters button appears and works
Live Feed page - Shows filtered count (7 din 15 when filtered)
Dashboard heatmap displays correctly with SF legend
Navigation between all pages working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (1 gateway, 299 devices, 15 uplinks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All search/sort/filter/export features on Gateways, Devices, and Live Feed pages are working correctly. CSV exports download with proper headers and data. The app has 1 gateway (Bacovia), 299 devices, and 15 uplinks. 5 unregistered devices are shown in Live Feed alert. The 'Istoric' navigation link goes to the Dashboard (Harta SF) page.
